transcript: See... that's what I don't understand '[beep]' about you, say you're gonna do it, but you never do, why don't you get your ass down here?
Oh, that sounds great! Get down here, asshole!
Oh, I'm fuckin' '[beep]' scared of your stupid chalice!
What? Are you hard of hearing and stupid? Get your... fuckin' white ass down here, and do it, alright?
I'm gonna regret it completely! Get--
Yeah, my gut hasn't been hit... in a long time, I can't wait.
That sounds great! Why don't you get down here and do it?
Then get down here and do it! I know you won't, 'cause I'll whip your ass!
Just wish you'd come down here and do it, so I could quit... fantasizing of having a hammer in my skull, alright?
